title: pelargonium × amabile
intro: Pelargonium × amabile, also known as rose geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family, characterized by its fragrant rose-like flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is known for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of rose geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or infused oil, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
